products.name: Apple iPhone 15 (128 GB) - Black
products.hook: Bhai sabse badi loot yahi hai! iPhone 15 par itna discount 😱
products.pain: Phone hang karta hai aur camera quality bakwas hai?
products.fix: Upgrade to iPhone 15. Best performance, amazing camera, aur type-C aagaya hai finally. Deal itni sahi hai ki miss mat karna!
products.loot_reason: Usually ₹79,900 ka milta hai, abhi direct price drop hai!

products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
products.hook: Silence chahiye zindagi mein? Ye Sony ke headphones try karo! 🎧
products.pain: Hostel/Ghar mein itna shor hota hai ki padhai nahi ho pati?
products.fix: Industry leading active noise cancellation. Ek baar pehn lo aur duniya gayab. Sound quality itni clear ki maza aa jayega.
products.loot_reason: Premium headphones par straight ₹8000 off mil raha hai!

products.name: boAt Airdopes 141 Bluetooth Truly Wireless in Ear Earbuds
products.hook: Saste mein mast TWS chahiye? Isse behtar kuch nahi! 🔥
products.pain: Wired earphones ulajh jaate hain aur bar bar kharab hote hain?
products.fix: boAt Airdopes 141 le lo. 42H playtime, clear sound aur fast charging. Price itni kam hai ki sochne ka time nahi hai.
products.loot_reason: ₹4490 ka MRP hai aur sirf ₹1299 me mil raha hai! Huge discount!

products.name: MI Power Bank 3i 20000mAh
products.hook: Battery anxiety khatam! Ye power bank sabka baap hai. 🔋
products.pain: College me din bhar phone use karne par battery khatam ho jati hai?
products.fix: MI ka 20000mAh power bank. Phone ko 4-5 baar charge karega aaram se. Dual USB output hai dosto ke sath bhi share kar sakte ho.
products.loot_reason: Price drop chal raha hai, ₹2149 mein best capacity power bank hai ye.

products.name: OnePlus Nord Buds 2 True Wireless Earbuds
products.hook: OnePlus lovers ke liye ekdum kadak sound! 🎵
products.pain: Budget me premium brand ke ANC earbuds nahi mil rahe?
products.fix: OnePlus Nord Buds 2 me Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) aur BassWave technology hai. Sound profile ekdum top tier hai is price segment me.
products.loot_reason: OnePlus ke premium buds par limited time discount!

products.name: SanDisk Ultra Dual Drive Go Type C Pendrive 64GB
products.hook: Phone ka storage full ho gaya? Ye chhoti si cheez zindagi bacha legi! 💾
products.pain: Phone me photos aur videos ki wajah se storage full ho jata hai bar bar?
products.fix: Ye SanDisk dual drive direct type-C phone me lagao, aur backup lelo! Laptop me bhi type-A se direct connect ho jayega. Easy file transfer.
products.loot_reason: More than 50% off chal raha hai is pendrive par, loot lo!

products.name: JBL Go 2, Wireless Portable Bluetooth Speaker
products.hook: Room parties ke liye isse badhiya budget speaker nahi hai! 🔈
products.pain: Phone ka speaker movie/music ke liye bahut low sound karta hai?
products.fix: JBL Go 2 compact hai, waterproof hai, aur bass ekdum kadak hai. Kahi bhi le jao, mast sound karega.
products.loot_reason: JBL ki brand value aur ₹1799 ka price tag, unbeatable combination hai.

products.name: Portronics Toad 13 Wireless Mouse
products.hook: Trackpad use karke ungliyan dukh gayi? Ye check karo! 🖱️
products.pain: Laptop ka trackpad assignments ke time bahut frustrating hota hai?
products.fix: Bas ₹299 me ek branded wireless mouse! Smooth tracking aur battery life bhi mast. Wire ka jhanjhat khatam.
products.loot_reason: ₹299 me branded wireless mouse milna impossible jaisa hai, jaldi lo!

products.name: Samsung Galaxy M14 5G
products.hook: Budget 5G phone dhundh rahe ho? Samsung M14 best hai! 📱
products.pain: Phone hang karta hai aur 5G support nahi hai?
products.fix: 50MP camera, 6000mAh badi battery aur 5G support. Is price me Samsung ka bharosa aur features dono mil rahe hain.
products.loot_reason: ₹12490 me Samsung ka 5G phone bahut rare discount hai.

products.name: Spigen Liquid Air Back Cover Case for iPhone 15
products.hook: iPhone le liya par cover nahi? Ye Spigen ka cover try karo! 🛡️
products.pain: Phone girne ka darr lagta hai lekin bulky cover pasand nahi?
products.fix: Spigen Liquid Air ekdum slim hai, grip acchi hai aur military-grade drop protection bhi. Phone premium bhi lagega aur safe bhi.
products.loot_reason: Premium Spigen cases pe rarely discount milta hai, ye perfect time hai lene ka.
